title: Verify existing auth middleware implementation
description: The auth middleware already exists at src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts with full JWT verification, rate limiting, session validation, and 8 passing tests. API routes are protected via withAuth HOC from src/auth/withAuth.ts. No additional work needed.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts: Factory pattern with UserStore, SessionStore, JwtService dependencies
src/auth/withAuth.ts: HOC wrapper for route handlers with optional/roles authentication options
src/auth/_auth.ts: extractBearerToken and checkRole utility functions
